action_items.action: RESPOND TO JOSHUA GROUP DM — GDCU-8851 Comparison Cards. Joshua asked in a group DM with Chloe (09:17): is this component still required or can it be dropped? Chloe simultaneously posted in #gdc-pod that the backlog is ordered for next cycle and top 7 tickets are ready for devs. Joshua needs a decision before devs pick up new sprint work. GDCU-8851 is unassigned, Backlog, last updated 20/04. Confirm: keep in scope or deprioritise? Reply to the group DM today.

GDCU-8874 PAGE BLOAT SEO — Now DAY 6 in Product (HIGH, Harden). Ticket was touched at 11:34 this morning but still In Product — no sign-off given. Four SEO fixes: CookieYes lazy render, SSR operator list, VWO async load, inline scripts — combined −58% payload on /uk/online-casinos (3,789 KB → ~1,600 KB). Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith, Gabriel Cornoiu, Dan Smullen. Approve implementation priority order before EOD.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — Day 7 stale. Sanja said fix was done on 07/05 but ticket status unchanged. No movement today. Hot ticket — Michael Butlin, Dan Smullen, Gabriel Cornoiu all stakeholders. Confirm with Sanja directly: is the fix deployed and QA can proceed? If yes, update status immediately to unblock QA.

REVIEW GDCU-8959 DUPLICATE PAYMENT METHODS — NEW In Product today (Sanja, 11:26). Ticket created per Chloe's #gdc-pod request Friday. Bug: duplicate payment providers on dual-language brand review pages (IS/EN, BE/FR). Fix: language-scoped payment provider filtering. Verify across casino, betting, poker reviews and oplists. Stakeholders: Eoin McCarthy, Joshua Smith, Diana Thurmann.

REVIEW GDCU-8894 VUE SCOPED STYLES — NEW In Product today (Novica, 11:27). CWV improvement: Vue scoped styles were negatively impacting Core Web Vitals. Novica has migrated to regular CSS. Straightforward review — confirm site matches production with no regressions. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith.

GDCU-8847 VIP REV SHARE OPERATOR LIST — Still In Product (Nebojsa), ticket was active at 13:19 this afternoon. UK personalisation: VIP users (ktag level ≥2 via AdTech API) see a custom revenue-share operator list. If not yet reviewed, do so now. Check Jira for any afternoon comments explaining the 13:19 update.

GDCU-8806 AGE GATE — Day 6 In Product (Carlos). Apple App Store Guideline 5.3 / Google Play compliance. No movement today. Blocks the app store submission pipeline alongside GDCU-8810. Approve or provide feedback to unblock Carlos before EOD.

GDCU-8810 DEVELOPER ACCOUNTS — Day 6 blocked (Harden). No update today. Contact RotoWire team to check if GDC Group org-level Apple/Google accounts already exist — could cut timeline from 6–8 weeks to 1–2 weeks. App store pipeline gated on this.

VIC DADSON — Day ~21 of zero Slack activity (last seen 21/04). No change from morning. Escalate now: contact Colin Brannigan to flag the extended absence and agree a cover plan for data engineering responsibilities.

GROUP BETS & WC PREDICTOR — Both now In Progress (Miguel, 10:17–10:18). Group Bets (GDCU-8904) is moving — confirm design sign-off with Chloe and schedule the dev KO call (11 June hard deadline). WC Predictor (GDCU-8935) also In Progress — confirm Miguel has the design brief and 12/05 target is achievable. WC Cosmo Spins (GDCU-8392) In Progress with Ciara — confirm sequencing with GDCU-8619.
LIAM CAFFREY INTERVIEW — Confirm Wed 14/05 12–3pm slot. Reply to Liam's DM; he noted Mike's calendar looked full in that window. Gabriel confirmed Wednesday works.
